title: narcissus assoanus subsp. gaditanus
intro: Narcissus assoanus subsp. gaditanus, also known as the Canary Island narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include having anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of this plant include potential uses in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are typically prepared by the plant's leaves and flowers.
